infotexts.entitydescription.blade: A long steel blade, designed for indoor fighting.
infotexts.entitydescription.bladeunique: A rare prototype, this high-frequency blade can cut through nearly anything when powered.
infotexts.entitydescription.bladehardened: A boarding blade that has been treated with a hardened coating of depleted uranium, strengthening the blade's cutting edge and enhancing its weight.
infotexts.entitydescription.steelmaul: A heavy steel maul on a long handle, smashes easily through most forms of armor.
infotexts.entitydescription.huntbelt: A belt with a small knife that increases the yield from harvesting corpses.
infotexts.entitydescription.sheathbelt: A sturdy belt with a magnetic carry system that can comfortably hold most melee weapons.
infotexts.entitydescription.clownextinguisher: A modified fire extinguisher that lasts longer and propels the user with more force. Can be stored in the inventory.
